body.u: It was fifty years to the day when I first left school. I remember my first interview that was a frightening experience. It was for a firm called “Abbots” I remember it well. I never got the job but my next interview at Medway Ports Authority was successful. I got the job as a audio-typist which was fairly new at that time. My first wage packet contained £40 which in those days was very reasonable. I remandremained there for several years.

Last week it was my wedding anniversary 42 years of marriage it was a big occassionoccasion. all the relations from New Zealand came over and there was a big reception afterwards. we went to Greece for a week then on to the Island of Mauritius to stop with a friend of mine.

When we returned I carried on my career as a n audio-typist to a new firm where I was living now. All the relations from New Zealand came over and there was a big reception afterwards. We went to Greece for a week then on to the Island of Mauritius to stop with a friend of mine.
When we returned I carried on my career as a n audio-typist to a new firm where I was living now.
